_note: Gemma-4-E2B + Qwen3.5-9B, both on ren3 MLX. E2B is the Tier 2 model whose Goldbach behavior is the missing cell in the anchor-richness gradient test (Collatz=confusion, Legendre=25% structured, twin-primes=structured). Sequential execution forces model swap between runs. E2B available on ren3 as mlx-community/gemma-4-e2b-it-4bit.
